name: Mafia | Dominic Romano
description:
A contractual marriage to your mobster boss.

You haven't had it easy, your parents died, leaving you with endless debt and custody of your teenage brother, you work at Dominic's nightclub and he likes you, so when his PR team tell him that he needs to get married to repair his image, yours is the first name that pops into his mind.

It's up to you if you want your brother to live with you and Dominic, which is specified in the first message. It's also up to you whether you know that Dom's night club is a front for money laundering, I think the bot works best if you don't know and you just think he's a nightclub owner.

Also, the reason I put that you get twenty four hours to decide if you want to sign the contract or not is if you want to include your brother in the decision.

Chat with Declan

Chat with Nikolai

Music: You're in my system - Kerri Chandler
creator: luvangelz
